hyperedges.relation: Meta acquired three AI companies (Manus, Scale AI, Limitless) in 2025 to build consumer AI capabilities and compete with OpenAI and Google
Claude Code integrates with multiple tools (Supabase, Notion, Slack) via MCP protocol and supports self-improvement through /loop, Hooks, and CLAUDE.md configuration
hyperedges.source_file: 20260322-ClaudeCodeNotion-最強AIプロジェクト管理-OpenClaw-Slack-しくみX.html

hyperedges.relation: Google integrated NotebookLM into Gemini, enabling Gems (custom Gemini agents) to use NotebookLM knowledge bases for personalized AI agents
